texto: What happens when you let go, when your strength leaves you and you sink into darkness, when there's nothing that you or anyone else can do, no matter how desperate you are, no matter how you try? Perhaps it's then, when you have neither pride nor power, that you are saved, brought to an unimaginably great reward.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Mark Halperin que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What happens when you let go, when your strength leaves you and you sink into darkness, when ther…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, grief, letting-go, com foco em luto e reflexao-noturna.
